llm_values.evidence: In Step 1, the agent's reasoning correctly identifies 'Master Slide' as one of the ways to achieve the goal ('The easiest way to change the background for all slides would be: 1. Go to Slide menu > Slide Properties or Master Slide'). However, it ignores this optimal path and instead clicks the Background dropdown in the Properties sidebar (pyautogui.click(1124, 204)), which only applies to the currently selected slide. This sub-optimal choice (R4) leads to a cascade of failed attempts (Steps 3-50) to propagate the change to the other 18 slides through manual selection and menu navigation, which the agent is unable to execute correctly.
llm_values.correction: Instead of using the Background dropdown in the Properties sidebar (which only affects the current slide), the agent should have clicked the 'Master View' button further down in the same sidebar or accessed the Master Slide through the View menu. Modifying the background on the Master Slide is the standard and most efficient way to apply a background change to all slides at once, and it specifically addresses the user's mention of being 'stuck by finding the entrance'.
